meta.homeTitle: HAMDEVA | Global Traditional Clothing AI Try-On
meta.homeDescription: Explore traditional clothing from around the world and preview garments with HAMDEVA AI virtual try-on.

hero.title:
See traditional clothing
before you wear it
hero.sub: HAMDEVA helps you explore cultural garments from around the world and preview them with AI in a fast, visual workflow.

cards.title: What Is HAMDEVA
cards.description: HAMDEVA is a global traditional clothing try-on platform. It combines cultural fashion guidance with AI previews so users can learn and test garments in one place.

cards.title: How AI Virtual Try-On Works
cards.description: The tool uses a person image for identity and a garment image for design fidelity. It then creates one consistent multi-angle try-on sheet in a single generation flow.

cards.title: Why Traditional Clothing Matters
cards.description: Traditional clothing carries history, ceremony, and local design language. HAMDEVA presents these garments as living culture rather than costume thumbnails.

home.toolIntroBody: Upload a portrait, select a garment, and let HAMDEVA generate a clean 1x4 fitting preview. Better source images usually produce more faithful results.

modal.title: Global Traditional Clothing Guide

overview.title: A content-first traditional clothing platform
paragraphs: HAMDEVA is designed as more than an image generator. It introduces users to traditional clothing from multiple regions and then lets them test garments through AI virtual try-on.
This structure makes the platform useful for travelers, students, fashion researchers, families planning portraits, and anyone curious about how cultural dress looks on a real person.
By combining educational content with a practical try-on tool, HAMDEVA helps people move from quick curiosity to informed visual understanding.

technology.title: How the try-on pipeline works
paragraphs: The system starts with a portrait image to keep the same face identity and overall appearance across the result. A clothing image is then used as the strongest reference for silhouette, color, trim, and surface detail.
Instead of generating four unrelated images, HAMDEVA asks the image model for one wide 1x4 fashion sheet. That keeps front, left 45-degree, right 45-degree, and back views more visually consistent.
This approach is more useful than a single front image because traditional garments often depend on side volume, sleeve shape, ribbon placement, or back drape.

cultural.title: Traditional clothing as living design
paragraphs: Traditional garments are not only historical objects. They remain part of celebrations, ceremonies, tourism, performance, identity, and modern design reinterpretation.
HAMDEVA currently highlights garments such as Hanbok, Kimono, Hanfu, Saree, Ao Dai, Chut Thai, Kebaya, Baju Kurung, Baro't Saya, Deel, Kaftan, Agbada, Huipil, Kilt, Dirndl, Flamenco dress, and Bunad.
Showing these clothes in one platform encourages comparison, respect, and broader awareness of how different cultures express beauty through structure, color, movement, and material.

future.title: Fashion technology with context
paragraphs: AI tools can make fashion easier to explore, but technology is most useful when it supports understanding rather than replacing it. Strong reference images, good prompts, and clear cultural context all matter.
A better digital fashion experience does not only produce attractive pictures. It helps users compare garments, preview silhouettes, and make more confident choices before purchase or rental.
HAMDEVA treats AI as a visual support layer for cultural fashion discovery, not as a substitute for craftsmanship, tradition, or expert fitting.

traditional-clothing.title: Traditional Clothing Around the World
traditional-clothing.description: Explore how different regions express identity, ceremony, and beauty through traditional dress.

sections.heading: A global clothing map
paragraphs: Traditional clothing exists in every region as a visual language shaped by climate, ceremony, craft, and social meaning.
HAMDEVA presents these garments as a connected global topic so users can compare silhouettes, layering systems, and cultural roles without reducing them to costume stereotypes.

sections.heading: Why comparison matters
paragraphs: Looking across countries helps users notice how different cultures solve similar design questions such as movement, layering, modesty, ornament, and ceremony.
That makes AI try-on more useful because the viewer understands what each garment is trying to communicate before previewing it on a person.

countries.title: Countries and Cultural Dress
countries.description: Browse a country-by-country overview of traditional garments featured on HAMDEVA.

sections.heading: Country cards
paragraphs: Use the country grid to review garment names and short cultural notes at a glance.
This page acts as a quick directory before entering the try-on flow or opening the detailed guide modal.

how-it-works.title: How It Works
how-it-works.description: See how HAMDEVA turns a portrait and clothing reference into one coordinated try-on result.

sections.heading: Step 1 – Upload a face photo
paragraphs: Choose a clear portrait with visible facial features and balanced lighting.
The system uses this image to keep the same identity across the final result.

sections.heading: Step 2 – Select a traditional garment
paragraphs: Pick a clothing image that clearly shows the full design, color, trim, and silhouette.
The stronger the garment reference, the more faithful the generated outfit usually becomes.

sections.heading: Step 3 – Generate one 1x4 result sheet
paragraphs: HAMDEVA requests one wide image that contains front, left 45-degree, right 45-degree, and back views.
This single-call approach improves consistency and makes comparison easier.

fashion-technology.title: Fashion Technology
fashion-technology.description: Understand how AI imaging supports cultural fashion discovery and visual decision-making.

sections.heading: Technology with reference discipline
paragraphs: Good virtual try-on depends on clear input hierarchy: the person image guides identity and the garment image guides clothing fidelity.
Without that discipline, generated fashion quickly becomes inconsistent or generic.

sections.heading: Why one combined sheet matters
paragraphs: A single 1x4 output behaves more like a lookbook page than four unrelated renders.
That makes it easier to judge proportion, back drape, sleeve shape, and overall garment continuity.

about.title: About HAMDEVA
about.description: Learn about the mission, technology vision, and purpose behind HAMDEVA.

sections.heading: Mission
paragraphs: HAMDEVA exists to make traditional clothing easier to explore through a combination of educational content and AI try-on previews.
The goal is to support curiosity, confidence, and cultural respect at the same time.

sections.heading: Why virtual fashion matters
paragraphs: Digital previews help users understand silhouette and styling before purchase, rental, travel, or family events.
For heritage fashion, that visual bridge can lower the barrier to exploration without replacing the value of real garments.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.description: Understand how HAMDEVA handles uploaded images and AI processing.

sections.heading: Uploaded images
paragraphs: User images are used to process the requested try-on result.
HAMDEVA does not present the service as a permanent personal photo archive.

sections.heading: Processing and storage
paragraphs: Images may be transmitted for AI processing, but the service is intended to avoid long-term personal photo storage as part of normal use.
Users should avoid uploading sensitive images they do not wish to process through an AI service.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.description: Read the core responsibilities and content rules for using HAMDEVA.

sections.heading: User responsibility
paragraphs: Users must upload images they have the right to use and should avoid unlawful, abusive, or misleading content.
The try-on output is AI-generated visual content and should be understood as a synthetic preview.

sections.heading: Content and copyright
paragraphs: Do not upload copyrighted or personal material without permission.
Users remain responsible for how they use generated outputs in public, commercial, or editorial contexts.

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: Reach HAMDEVA for support, questions, or partnership inquiries.

sections.heading: Support
paragraphs: Use the contact form or direct email for product issues, article feedback, or partnership discussions.
We review messages related to AI quality, cultural content, and platform support.

contact.supportBody: For customer support, partnership questions, or editorial feedback, contact HAMDEVA at
